THE APP

Built for real
boxing fans

Every feature designed around one idea — your opinion matters. Back it with data.

LIVE SCORING

Score every round as it happens

The moment the first bell rings, open RoundCard and start scoring. Award each round with a simple tap, lock it in, and move to the next. Your card builds in real time.

→ Clean +/- interface — score a round in seconds
→ Fighter photos and records on every fight
→ KO/stoppage support — end the card early if the fight ends early
→ Resume scoring if you close the app mid-fight
YOUR SCORECARDS

Your card. On the record. Forever.

Submit your scorecard and it becomes part of the permanent record. Browse scorecards from judges you follow. Rate cards with a glove tap and debate in threaded comments.

→ Full round-by-round breakdown on every card
→ Community glove ratings — 1 to 5 🥊
→ Threaded comments with replies and likes
→ Follow other judges and build your feed
YOUR PROFILE

Build your judge reputation

Every scorecard you submit builds your profile. Earn badges, maintain your weekly streak, climb the judge tiers, and let your record speak for itself.

→ 6 judge tiers from Newcomer to Master Judge
→ Badges for milestones — First Blood, Ten Deep, On Fire
→ Weekly scoring streak tracker
→ Followers, following and leaderboard ranking
HOW IT WORKS

Four steps.
One verdict.

01

Pick a fight

Browse live and upcoming fights on Fight Night. Tap Score Now when the bell rings.

→
02

Score each round

Award each round to a fighter. Lock it before the next round starts.

→
03

Submit your card

When the final bell rings, submit. Real judges can't change their scores — neither can you.

→
04

Defend your call

See the community consensus. Read comments. Defend your scorecard.

the ranks

Privacy Policy

Last updated: May 2026

What we collect

  • Email address (for account creation)
  • Display name, username, bio and profile photo (optional, set by you)
  • Scorecards and round scores you submit
  • Comments and ratings you post
  • Device information for app functionality

What we don't collect

  • We do not sell your data to third parties
  • We do not serve advertisements
  • We do not share your personal information with anyone outside of providing the service

How we use your data

  • To create and manage your account
  • To display your scorecards and profile to the community (only what you choose to make public)
  • To calculate leaderboard rankings and judge tiers
  • To send notifications you have opted into

Data storage

Your data is stored securely on Supabase servers. We use industry-standard encryption for data in transit and at rest.

Your rights

  • You can edit or delete your profile at any time from the app
  • You can withdraw submitted scorecards at any time
  • You can request full deletion of your account and data by emailing us

Contact

For any privacy queries: privacy@roundcard.app

Changes

We may update this policy as the app evolves. Continued use of the app constitutes acceptance of any changes.

ROUNDCARD

Score it. Own it. Defend it.
